text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've all come to cheer for Silence<n>Suzuka in her
exhibition race.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ooh, I'm so excited!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whew, made it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, you must be...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's the name! Has<n>Suzuka already
run?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew, that's a relief.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And here's another star descending<n>onto the turf,
Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hello...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka! SUZUKAAA!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, hehe... Spe's here too.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Good luck, Suzuka! Suzukaaa! You<n>can do it!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I see... This is them sending me<n>off—until I come
back safe to them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The gates fly open, and her race<n>begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She dominates in a gate-to-wire romp.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you, all of you, for your<n>support today.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
With you cheering me on, I was able<n>to take first.
And now, I'd like to sing<n>my thanks to you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzukaaa! Welcome hooome!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
You were great, Suzuka! Welcome<n>home! Amazing
running today!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... So, they've been saying it this<n>whole time,
huh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And look how much their expressions<n>have
changed since before the race.<n>They all look so
happy...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What's... gotten into me?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, I want to return to<n>this place
again. Here, where they're<n>all waiting for me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I still want to run and run as far as mylegs will take me, but I also want to... Ineed to come back here.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I, um... have something to tell you all.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
This won't be the last time I come<n>home to you.
So please...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Look forward to my next concert. I<n>hope it'll be
fun for all of us.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzukaaaa! We'll be waiting for<n>youuu...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oho?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, as we're working<n>on the Grand
Concert...

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Are you the ones doing<n>that Grand
Concert project Suzuka's<n>a part of?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, that's us!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh, please let me join! Pretty<n>please!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
We get to stand on the same stage<n>as Suzuka?
And sing G1 songs too?

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: Is it true that anyone can get up onstage and sing their gratitude? I'venever gotten to hold a mic even once!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It's true!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We'll all tell our fans how grateful we<n>are for them
together! That's what<n>the Grand Concert's all
about!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Wow!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, everyone wants to get in on it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And who do you think is in large part<n>responsible
for that?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, I must say you gave us<n>quite the
spectacular reaction at that<n>concert.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Which means there must have been<n>some change
in you that sparked it.<n>Or rather, you found
something...<n>didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Mhm... I thought about what concerts<n>mean to
me... to everyone, and—

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: ENOUGH!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I-is something the matter? There's no<n>need to
yell...

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
This whole Grand Concert thing<n>needs to end
now!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
...So those are the people going on<n>about this
"Grand Concert"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember her watching one of our<n>concerts, with
anger radiating from<n>her face.

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: Everyone gets to sing? Cut thecrap!

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what do you mean? This will be<n>an
opportunity for all of you to give<n>thanks to your
fans!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: We don't need that! The fact that youhave to win is what makesconcerts special!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
We all want to sing, to stand center<n>stage! Our
fans cheer for us because<n>they want to see us
there too!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
What's the point if everyone gets to<n>sing? Don't
cheapen our hard work!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
You say it's for the fans, but to me it<n>just sounds
like an excuse to escape<n>from the reality that we
can't win!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Th-that's not...

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
Runners like you could never<n>understand how us
losers feel! Just<n>leave us alone!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Er, I think I'm gonna head out...

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, me too. I have training to do.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: W-wait! What about wanting to join<n>us?

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but uh... I don't think I'm ready<n>for the
stage yet.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
That's not true! Your songs... your<n>words matter
too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A stifling silence descends, and we<n>decide to call it
for the day.
